content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +0.96%, Auto leading +2.33%, IT +1.52%, and VIX collapsing -6.93% to 16.80 — risk-on tape. Existing book is mostly green (+0.86% session, +6.1% on PNBHOUSING). Priority is to lock in gains via SL trails on the winners rather than chase fresh breakouts in an already 50%-deployed book with a poor 5-day win rate (14%, profit factor 0.4x).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24050,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1015.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up +6.1% with strong Q4 (PAT +18%, GNPA <1%). Tightening SL from 1028 to 1015 — actually that's loosening; correcting: keeping SL at 1028 locks in +4.5% gain. Holding existing 1028 SL which is already above entry. No-op MODIFY would be wasted — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Override prior MODIFY. Current SL 1028.02 already locks ~4.5% gain above entry 984. Target 1110 intact (R1 1001, R2 1013 already broken; 52w high 1141 is the next major resistance). Valuation now 'expensive' per research, so don't get greedy — let the locked-in SL do its job."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -1.9%, near SL 119 but still has room. Risk-on day (VIX -7%) is pressuring gold short-term, but structural drivers (CB buying, geopolitics) intact. SL at 119 is appropriate; not tightening as gold needs room for noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1438.00,
      "new_target": 1485.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op detected — current SL already 1438 (above entry 1413, locks ~1.8%). Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Override above. SL at 1438 already at breakeven+ (entry 1412.94). Stock at 1455 with target 1485 still ~2% away. P/E elevated at 73x leaves limited upside cushion; locked-in SL is correct posture."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 401.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Trail SL from 398 to 401 — tightening into Q4 results May 15 binary event. Position only +0.8%, not yet at 2% trigger for breakeven, but tightening to reduce binary-event downside while preserving room for summer peak demand thesis. Risk on position now ~1.4% from CMP 407."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1742.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op detected — current SL already 1742. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Override above. SL at 1742 already above entry 1734 — gain locked. Organon deal catalyst priced in; Q4 results May 21. Letting it run toward 1830 target with breakeven+ SL protection."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Only +0.2%, SL 316.50 (~1.4% below CMP) appropriate. Defensive transmission play with peak demand tailwind. Not at trail trigger yet."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +0.4%, SL 465 (~1.2% below CMP). Q4 results good (+11% PAT), dividend Rs 5.25 declared. Not at 2% trigger; current SL gives room for normal volatility."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 605.00,
      "new_target": 660.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Tightening SL from 598 to 605 — ex-dividend tomorrow (Apr 30) for Rs 11/share, expect ~Rs 11 mechanical drop. Want SL below the post-dividend level to avoid getting taken out on the technical adjustment. Current 598 too wide; 605 still leaves ~9 pts buffer post-dividend (CMP 614 - 11 div = 603). Actually 605 would trigger — revising. Holding 598 to absorb dividend mechanic."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Override above. Ex-dividend Apr 30 for Rs 11/share will mechanically drop the stock; SL at 598 is correctly placed below the post-dividend level (614 - 11 = 603). Tightening SL above 603 would trigger on the dividend adjustment. Hold current SL through ex-date."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1028.02,
      "reasoning": "SL already locks +4.5%. Stock had a -1% intraday pullback after a massive run — not breaking the structure. Let it work toward 1110."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Holding through risk-on noise. SL gives 3% room from CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1438.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven+. Strong Q4 momentum, defensive. Target 1485 intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 401.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten from 398 to 401 ahead of Q4 results May 15."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1742.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already above entry. Organon deal catalyst, Q4 May 21."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 316.50,
      "reasoning": "Position too small in P&L for trail; SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 465.00,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4, dividend on tap. SL at 465 appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 598.00,
      "reasoning": "Ex-dividend Apr 30 (Rs 11/share). SL deliberately wide to absorb the technical price adjustment without getting stopped out."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BANDHANBNK / MARUTI / TECHM / ITC / INTELLECT / CEATLTD all interesting setups but book is already 50% deployed with a poor 5-day track record (win rate 14%, profit factor 0.4x). Deployment hysteresis applies — focus on managing existing winners rather than adding. ADANIENT and INDUSTOWER have binary Q4 events tomorrow (Apr 30) — avoid pre-event entries. BAJFINANCE Q4 today post-market — wait for the print. CEATLTD post-results +8% rally is best left alone after the move. Three pending CNC limits (GLENMARK, PHARMABEES, TATAPOWER) are still working — leaving alone to fill or expire naturally; thesis on each remains intact and prices are not chasing.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is in good shape: 6 of 8 positions green, +0.86% session P&L. Key risk management actions taken: (1) tightened NTPC SL ahead of binary results; (2) explicitly held HINDZINC SL wide to absorb ex-dividend mechanic Apr 30 — important not to get stopped out by a non-economic price drop; (3) confirmed PNBHOUSING/NESTLEIND/SUNPHARMA SLs are already at or above breakeven, locking in gains. No new entries today — book is 50% deployed, 5-day win rate is poor (14%), and there's no setup materially better than what's already held. Capital preservation > activity."
}
